View.style: padding: 12px; background: #e3f2fd; margin-bottom: 15px; border-left: 4px solid #2196f3; border-radius: 4px;
display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 8px;
padding: 15px; background: #fff3e0; margin-bottom: 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ffe0b2;

Header.value: 📋 主诉（Chief Complaint）+ 现病史（Present Illness History）

Text.name: chief_complaint_text
Text.value:
就诊时间：$emr_activity_info[0].activity_time
主诉：$emr_activity_info[0].chief_complaint
现病史：$emr_activity_info[0].present_illness_his
---------
就诊时间：$emr_activity_info[1].activity_time
主诉：$emr_activity_info[1].chief_complaint
现病史：$emr_activity_info[1].present_illness_his
---------
就诊时间：$emr_activity_info[2].activity_time
主诉：$emr_activity_info[2].chief_complaint
现病史：$emr_activity_info[2].present_illness_his
---------
就诊时间：$emr_activity_info[3].activity_time
主诉：$emr_activity_info[3].chief_complaint
现病史：$emr_activity_info[3].present_illness_his
---------
就诊时间：$emr_activity_info[4].activity_time
主诉：$emr_activity_info[4].chief_complaint
现病史：$emr_activity_info[4].present_illness_his
---------
就诊时间：$emr_activity_info[5].activity_time
主诉：$emr_activity_info[5].chief_complaint
现病史：$emr_activity_info[5].present_illness_his
---------
就诊时间：$emr_activity_info[6].activity_time
主诉：$emr_activity_info[6].chief_complaint
现病史：$emr_activity_info[6].present_illness_his
Text.style: font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; padding: 10px; background: white; border-radius: 4px; margin-top: 10px; min-height: 30px; white-space: pre-wrap;
